description: P1: Database migration — create `quotes` table with all fields including is_template boolean, indexes, and Citus-compatible composite keys

P1: Database migration — create `quote_activities` table for audit trail
P1: Add 'QUOTE' entity type to SharedNumberingService and seed next_number table with prefix='Q-', padding_length=4

P1: Quote model — update (validates status transition, updates fields, logs activity)
P1: Quote model — delete via deleteEntityWithValidation: hard delete drafts with no business history, archive for others

P1: Server action — getQuote (single) and listQuotes (paginated list)

P1: Server action — updateQuoteItem, removeQuoteItem, reorderQuoteItems
P1: Service catalog integration — search/pick service, populate item with defaults
P1: Service catalog integration — rate override on quote item (custom pricing)
P1: Service catalog integration — support all billing methods (fixed, hourly, usage, per_unit)
P1: Optional line items — is_optional flag stored and returned in item data
P1: Recurring/one-time — is_recurring and billing_frequency stored and returned

P1: QuoteLineItems editor — remove items and reorder via drag

P2: Tax calculation — integrate taxService.calculateTax() per quote line item

P2: Tax calculation — support tax_source (internal/external/pending_external)

P4: Client portal — Reject action with comment field: sets rejected_at, rejection_reason, status → rejected

P5: Post-conversion links — quote detail links to converted contract/invoice, and vice versa
P6: Internal approval — 'pending_approval' and 'approved' statuses added to QuoteStatus
